hero.title:
Learn smarter.
Achieve more.
hero.subtitle: The first truly AI-native learning platform for students — with a personal tutor, smart exams, and adaptive courses all in one place.

features.title:
Built for the way
students actually learn
features.subtitle: Six core systems working together — from AI tutoring to OCR grading — designed to adapt to every pace and style.

tutor.title: Personal AI Tutor
tutor.desc: Context-aware assistant that remembers your learning history, explains concepts step-by-step, and adapts to your level in real time.

ocr.title: Handwritten Exam Grading
ocr.desc: Upload a photo of your handwritten answer sheet. Our OCR engine reads it, grades it, and provides detailed feedback in under 30 seconds.

questions.title: AI Question Generator
questions.desc: Instantly generate practice questions on any topic, with difficulty tuned to your current level. Never run out of study material.

analytics.title: Performance Analytics
analytics.desc: Real-time dashboards tracking your progress, identifying weak spots, and recommending what to study next using ML models.

marketplace.title: Course Marketplace
marketplace.desc: 500+ expert-designed courses with video lessons, interactive exercises, and downloadable materials across all subjects.

educators.title: Educator Marketplace
educators.desc: Teachers can publish and sell their own courses, track student progress, and build a sustainable income from their expertise.

aiTutor.title:
Your personal teacher.
Available 24/7.
aiTutor.subtitle: Ask anything — from a quick formula to a full concept explanation. The AI Tutor understands context, remembers previous conversations, and speaks your language.

bullets.memory: Multi-turn memory — it remembers what you discussed last session
bullets.subjects: Subject-aware — switches mode from Math to Arabic literature seamlessly
bullets.streaming: Streaming responses — answers appear word-by-word in real time
bullets.rag: RAG-powered — pulls from your course materials for precise answers
bullets.safe: Safe & filtered — all responses are validated before reaching you

demo.name: Satr AI Tutor
demo.userMessage1: Explain Newton's Second Law with an example
demo.aiMessage1: Newton's Second Law states that the net force on an object equals its mass times acceleration:
demo.aiExample: Example: A soccer ball (0.5 kg) kicked with 10N of force accelerates at 20 m/s² — it moves fast because it's light!

exam.title:
Upload. Grade.
Improve instantly.
exam.subtitle: Revolutionary OCR technology reads your handwriting, grades your answers against the model solution, and tells you exactly where you lost marks — all in under 30 seconds.

upload.title: Upload your answer sheet
upload.desc: Photo, scan, or PDF — any format works

grade.title: Automatic grading
grade.desc: Compared against model answer with scoring

report.title: Detailed report
report.desc: Score breakdown, errors explained, next steps

python.title: Python for Beginners — Zero to Hero
python.author: Eng. Mona Samir

testimonials.title: Loved by over a million students

youssef.text: The AI Tutor explained derivatives in a way my teacher never could. I went from failing math to scoring 95% on my finals.
youssef.name: Youssef Mahmoud

nour.text: The OCR exam grading is mind-blowing. I upload my test, and within seconds I know exactly which topics to review before the next exam
nour.name: Nour Rashed

hassan.text: I use Satr Edu to create content for my students. The question generator saves me hours every week and the quality is outstanding.
hassan.name: Hassan Tawfik
